title: Paula Corey
compiled_truth: Paula Corey is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-10 to 2002-05-22), Paula Corey sent 16 and received 45 emails, totalling 61 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (7), [J Kaminski](people/j-kaminski) (5), [Shirley Crenshaw](people/shirley-crenshaw) (3), [Doug Sewell](people/doug-sewell) (2), [Joe Parks](people/joe-parks) (2). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, deleted_items, inbox, market_intel.
